case_title: HARTFORD CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. STUART PHILLIP KAUFMAN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-14-2004 CONTINUED TO MAY-19-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). APR-14-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARTFORD CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAUFMAN, STUART PHILLIP $4,996.75 PRINCIPAL, $210.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,207.05, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
